posts.author: Markmaker
posts.text: I’ve found this post very insightful and practical in terms of expectations.. Do read.. open.substack.com The Curious Case of SAMHI Hotels Once the darling of Indian Fintwit. Now a forgotten room service tray in the corner. What happened to the cleverest hotel story in the country, and what do you do if you're holding the bag?

posts.author: Aiyappaa
posts.text: i came across recent blog on samhi turnaround story image 3660×2231 306 KB https://www.tradejini.com/blogs/samhi-hotels-limited-a-fundamental-analysis-of-the-turnaround-case Revenue per room has gone up , which is positive sign
